fields.summary: Describes the per-component swizzle mapping used in a Vulkan YCbCr conversion.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`GRVkYcbcrComponents` specifies how the red, green, blue, and alpha components of a
sampled image are remapped during a Vulkan YCbCr (YUV) sampler conversion. Each
property holds a `VkComponentSwizzle` value identifying which source component feeds
that channel. This struct is used as the `Components` field of
<xref:SkiaSharp.GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo>.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var components = new GRVkYcbcrComponents
{
    R = (uint)VkComponentSwizzle.Identity,
    G = (uint)VkComponentSwizzle.Identity,
    B = (uint)VkComponentSwizzle.Identity,
    A = (uint)VkComponentSwizzle.Identity,
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle applied to the alpha component.
fields.value: A <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value specifying the source for the alpha channel.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle applied to the blue component.
fields.value: A <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value specifying the source for the blue channel.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The value to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all component swizzle values are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> with equal component values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle applied to the green component.
fields.value: A <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value specifying the source for the green channel.

fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current instance.
fields.returns: A hash code based on all four component swizzle values.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents left, SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents right);

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> instances are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents left, SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents right);

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> instances are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are not equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle applied to the red component.
fields.value: A <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value specifying the source for the red channel.
